deep_dive.title: Semantic Communications in the THz Band
deep_dive.abstract: Semantic and terahertz (THz)-band communications are algorithmic and spectral enablers of future wireless networks. This work investigates deep learning-based semantic communication (DeepSC) over THz channels. We show that DeepSC models trained solely under additive white Gaussian noise generalize well to the tested THz block- and fast-fading channels when receiver-side compensation is applied. To enable fully data-driven reception, we propose a lightweight neural detector that does not require channel state information (CSI). At 0.3 THz, DeepSC outperforms a throughput-matched traditional coded communication system baseline over 0-12 dB signal-to-noise ratio (SNR), achieving more than 50 percentage-point higher Bilingual Evaluation Understudy unigram (BLEU-1) score. The proposed pilot-free detector outperforms minimum mean square error (MMSE) equalization with both perfect and imperfect CSI and remains robust to frequency offsets up to 50 MHz, highlighting the resilience of semantic communication to THz channel impairments.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Deep learning-based semantic communication over THz channels with neural detector
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于深度学习的太赫兹信道语义通信及轻量神经检测器
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于深度学习的太赫兹信道语义通信及轻量神经检测器
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于深度学习的太赫兹信道语义通信及轻量神经检测器
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Investigates DeepSC over THz channels, shows generalization from AWGN to fading, and proposes a lightweight neural detector outperforming traditional systems.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文研究太赫兹（THz）频段下的深度学习语义通信（DeepSC）。实验表明，仅在加性高斯白噪声下训练的DeepSC模型能泛化至THz块衰落和快衰落信道，配合接收端补偿。还提出一种无需信道状态信息的轻量神经检测器。在0.3 THz，DeepSC在BLEU-1指标上比传统编码系统高50个百分点以上。该工作为语义通信在THz频段的应用奠定了基础。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文研究太赫兹（THz）频段下的深度学习语义通信（DeepSC）。实验表明，仅在加性高斯白噪声下训练的DeepSC模型能泛化至THz块衰落和快衰落信道，配合接收端补偿。还提出一种无需信道状态信息的轻量神经检测器。在0.3 THz，DeepSC在BLEU-1指标上比传统编码系统高50个百分点以上。该工作为语义通信在THz频段的应用奠定了基础。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Find novel neural network architectures for communication channel modeling and equalization

quick_skim.title: Foundations of Equivariant Deep Learning: Unifying Graph and Sheaf Neural Networks
quick_skim.abstract: Symmetry is everywhere in nature and society. Geometric deep learning exploits symmetries in data to improve the performance and efficiency of deep learning systems. In this paper, we extend geometric deep learning to utilize richer symmetry structures. Specifically, we develop order-equivariant neural networks (OENN), which generalize standard graph message passing and sheaf neural networks via the theory of equivariant bundles over face posets (face categories). We (i) characterize all linear order-equivariant maps, (ii) build OENN layers, and (iii) prove universal approximation theorems (UATs) for continuous order-equivariant maps, which are new results even when restricted to sheaf neural networks (for which no UAT was known before). We illustrate the framework on graph and sheaf models. Our results can also be seen as extending the known UAT for graph neural networks to a more general setting that subsumes sheaf neural networks as well. In addition, we show that OENN can be extended further to CENN, Category-Equivariant Neural Network, which gives the general form of equivariant neural networks as well as of equivariant universal approximation theorems, allowing us to leverage categorical symmetry in data (e.g., non-invertible symmetries on multiple objects with compositional relations on those symmetries).
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: novel neural network architectures - order-equivariant neural networks
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 新颖神经网络架构 - 阶等变神经网络
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 新颖神经网络架构 - 阶等变神经网络
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 新颖神经网络架构 - 阶等变神经网络
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Develops order-equivariant neural networks (OENN) as a new architecture generalizing graph and sheaf NNs.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出阶等变神经网络（OENN），通过面偏序集上的等变丛理论统一并泛化了图神经网络和层神经网络，证明了所有线性等变映射的完整刻画及连续等变映射的普适逼近定理，为几何深度学习提供更丰富的对称性利用方法。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出阶等变神经网络（OENN），通过面偏序集上的等变丛理论统一并泛化了图神经网络和层神经网络，证明了所有线性等变映射的完整刻画及连续等变映射的普适逼近定理，为几何深度学习提供更丰富的对称性利用方法。

quick_skim.title: Hybrid Least Squares/Gradient Descent Methods for MIONets
quick_skim.abstract: In this paper, we propose an efficient hybrid least squares/gradient descent (LSGD) method for MIONets to accelerate training. This method generalizes the LSGD method for DeepONets. Since MIONet is the sum of the entrywise product of multiple branch networks and a trunk network, it can be viewed as a multilinear function with respect to the last layer parameters of each branch network. These sets of parameters can be optimized using the alternating least squares method, where we solve the LS system for a single branch network in turn. To handle the large-sized system matrix, we introduce Kronecker and Khatri-Rao products and tensor permutation matrices to factor the large matrix into small ones. Our method is compatible with a general type of $L^2$ loss with regularization terms for the last layer parameters of each branch, where linear operators can be applied to the MIONet output in each loss term.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Efficient hybrid LSGD method for MIONets, applicable to efficient neural operator designs for communication
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 针对MIONet的高效混合最小二乘/梯度下降方法，可用于通信高效算子设计
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 针对MIONet的高效混合最小二乘/梯度下降方法，可用于通信高效算子设计
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 针对MIONet的高效混合最小二乘/梯度下降方法，可用于通信高效算子设计
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes an efficient hybrid LSGD method for MIONets, accelerating training by alternating least squares on branch network parameters.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出一种用于MIONet的高效混合最小二乘/梯度下降（LSGD）训练方法。该方法利用交替最小二乘优化各分支网络最后一层参数，并通过Kronecker积和矩阵分解处理大规模系统矩阵。与标准方法相比，显著加速训练。该工作为高效神经算子设计提供了通用训练加速工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出一种用于MIONet的高效混合最小二乘/梯度下降（LSGD）训练方法。该方法利用交替最小二乘优化各分支网络最后一层参数，并通过Kronecker积和矩阵分解处理大规模系统矩阵。与标准方法相比，显著加速训练。该工作为高效神经算子设计提供了通用训练加速工具。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: efficient neural network designs for communication

quick_skim.title: -8 dB SNR + 90% Packet Loss: MamVSC -- CSI-Guided Semantic Mamba for Extreme-Robust Video Semantic Communication
quick_skim.abstract: Semantic communication, leveraging joint source-channel coding, is designed to mitigate semantic distortion introduced by the channel. However, most current studies focus solely on semantic deviation distortion caused by physical wireless channels, while overlooking semantic erasure distortion due to packet loss. A CSI-Guided Mamba-based video semantic wireless digital communication system (MamVSC) employing semantic grouping is proposed to simultaneously address both semantic deviation and erasure distortions. In this system, a semantic Mamba module, guided by channel state information (CSI) feedback, is utilized to dynamically adjust the granularity of extracted semantic information, adapting to channel conditions. Furthermore, a Semantic Channel Codec based on dynamic Semantic clustering centers is introduced, where the distance between semantic vectors within the same semantic class and their corresponding Semantic clustering center is dynamically adjusted according to channel conditions, enhancing robustness against channel noise. Additionally, a adaptive packet loss recovery module, dynamically adaptive to the CSI, is proposed. The system achieves an MS-SSIM greater than 0.6 and a PSNR exceeding 21 dB at an SNR of -8 dB and a packet loss rate of 90% in AWGN channel.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: CSI-guided Mamba for video semantic communication
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: CSI引导Mamba用于视频语义通信
quick_skim.llm_evidence: CSI引导Mamba用于视频语义通信
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: CSI引导Mamba用于视频语义通信
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a CSI-guided Mamba-based video semantic communication system (MamVSC) addressing both semantic deviation and erasure distortions via adaptive semantic grouping and Mamba module.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有语义通信忽略数据包丢失导致的语义擦除失真的问题，提出了一种CSI引导的Mamba视频语义通信系统MamVSC。该系统采用语义分组机制，并利用状态空间模型Mamba根据CSI反馈动态调整语义提取粒度，同时应对语义偏差和擦除失真。实验表明在极低信噪比和高丢包率下仍能保持鲁棒性能。该方法展示了状态空间模型在通信系统中的适应性，但未直接涉及信道建模或均衡。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有语义通信忽略数据包丢失导致的语义擦除失真的问题，提出了一种CSI引导的Mamba视频语义通信系统MamVSC。该系统采用语义分组机制，并利用状态空间模型Mamba根据CSI反馈动态调整语义提取粒度，同时应对语义偏差和擦除失真。实验表明在极低信噪比和高丢包率下仍能保持鲁棒性能。该方法展示了状态空间模型在通信系统中的适应性，但未直接涉及信道建模或均衡。
